text: Personal data shall be processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Personal data shall be collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes and not further processed in a manner that is incompatible with those purposes.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Personal data shall be adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary in relation to the purposes for which they are processed.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Where processing is based on consent, the controller shall be able to demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Processing of personal data revealing racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, or trade union membership, and the processing of genetic data, biometric data for the purpose of uniquely identifying a natural person, data concerning health or data concerning a natural person's sex life or sexual orientation shall be prohibited.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Natürliche Personen, die im Inland einen Wohnsitz oder ihren gewöhnlichen Aufenthalt haben, sind unbeschränkt einkommensteuerpflichtig.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Unbeschränkt steuerpflichtig sind jene natürlichen Personen, die im Inland einen Wohnsitz oder ihren gewöhnlichen Aufenthalt haben. Die unbeschränkte Steuerpflicht erstreckt sich auf alle in- und ausländischen Einkünfte.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.

text: Beschränkt steuerpflichtig sind jene natürlichen Personen, die im Inland weder einen Wohnsitz noch ihren gewöhnlichen Aufenthalt haben. Die beschränkte Steuerpflicht erstreckt sich nur auf die im § 98 aufgezählten Einkünfte.
provenance_note: Extracted from local raw source during R13.3. Not benchmark data. Not original Sun data.
